title: blechnum squamulosum
intro: Blechnum squamulosum, also known as the scaly water fern, is a type of perennial fern native to tropical and subtropical regions of the world. The medicinal properties of Blechnum squamulosum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and lower blood pressure. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to treat conditions such as arthritis, fever, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a natural diuretic and to reduce menstrual cramps. Blechnum squamulosum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine in various forms, including dried leaves and roots.
